title: GATE CS: Data Structures
description: Comprehensive guide to Data Structures for GATE Computer Science preparation.

lessons.title: Introduction to Linked Lists
lessons.description: Understanding singly, doubly, and circular linked lists for GATE.

quiz.question: What is the time complexity to insert at the beginning of a singly linked list?
Which linked list allows traversal in both directions?
In a circular linked list, where does the last node point?

title: GATE EE: Control Systems
description: Master Control Systems for GATE Electrical Engineering with clear concepts and problems.

lessons.title: Transfer Functions
lessons.description: Basics of Laplace transforms and transfer function derivation.

quiz.question: What is a transfer function?
options: Ratio of Laplace transform of output to input with zero initial conditions

quiz.question: Transfer functions are applicable to which systems?

title: Data Science with Python
description: Learn how to use Python, Pandas, and NumPy for data analysis and visualization.

lessons.title: Pandas DataFrames
lessons.description: Manipulating tabular data with the Pandas library.

quiz.question: What is a DataFrame in Pandas?
Which function is used to read a CSV file in Pandas?

title: UI/UX Design Essentials
description: Learn the principles of user interface and user experience design.

lessons.title: Design Thinking Process
lessons.description: Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, and Test.

quiz.question: What is the first stage of Design Thinking?
What is a wireframe?
options: A low-fidelity visual guide of a page

title: Introduction to AI
description: Learn the fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence, from neural networks to generative models.

lessons.title: What is AI?
lessons.description: A high-level overview of what AI is and how it differs from traditional programming.

quiz.question: What is the primary goal of AI?
options: To create systems that can perform tasks requiring human intelligence

quiz.question: Which of these is a branch of AI?
